conGovTooltip: Collaborators, publish online, or invite editors.
conHistorySelectStep: Select a step to see what changed.
conRevertTooltip: Open Trees to switch course or reload from disk
constructionBranchMetaFileHint: Author and description are saved in this branch. The .arborito file you export or share includes the tree with them.
constructionBranchMetaHubHint: Author and description are stored in this branch. Export the .arborito file to share them — publishing online is optional.
constructionEnterBranchToEdit: Open a branch in this tree to edit its lessons.
constructionEnterPickTitle: What do you want to edit?
constructionGuideBranchMetaHint: Author, description, and publishing: Publish button in the dock
constructionGuideComposedBranchHint: Publishing updates the whole tree (all branches)
constructionGuideComposedRootHint: Open a branch to edit lessons, or add branches with +
constructionGuideEditorSecondary: Team: links and invites (only the owner can publish)
constructionGuideGovernanceHint: Team: invite editors and share links
constructionGuideLocalUnpublished: Publish this course when it is ready
constructionGuideOwnerSecondary: Team: invite editors and share links
constructionGuideTreeAboutHint: Course description: «About this tree» button above the map
constructionHintBranchCourse: You are editing lessons in this module
constructionHintGovernanceOnly: Limited role — use Team to collaborate
constructionHintMapFolder: Folder inside the module — name and icon above
constructionHintTreePlaylist: Open or add a module to edit lessons
constructionNoEditAccess: You do not have edit access to this course.
constructionReadOnlyInMode: This course is read-only. You can explore the map, but you cannot save changes here.
constructionRequiresTree: Open or create a course first (Trees & libraries).
constructionRequiresWritable: Construction mode only works on a course you can edit. Open one from My Garden or your own online course (this source is read-only).
constructionScopePublishComposedNote: Publishing updates the whole tree (all branches)
constructionSessionPlaylistHint: Open or add a branch to edit
constructionSessionProposerHint: Limited role — use Team to collaborate
emptyModuleConstructHint: In construction, this point is an empty folder: create a lesson so people have something to open.
emptyModuleDesc: This branch has no lessons yet. Open Trees & libraries to load another course, or add lessons in construction mode if you edit this tree.
governanceCollabOwnerOnly: Only whoever published from here can invite or remove.
governanceCopyOpenLinkBtn: Copy link to open or add course
governanceCourseLinkBlurb: This technical link opens or adds the course on another device; it does not grant editing by itself.
governanceForumPolicyNeedNetwork: Open your published public tree to change forum settings.
governanceLinkFootShort: Unpublish or moderate forum: same browser where you published (Construction).
governanceLocalNoActionsBody: For now this course only lives in your browser. Publish it to get a shareable link, invite collaborators to edit, and open it from other devices. While it stays local, the only way to keep a copy off this browser is to export it as a file from Profile → Backup.
governanceLocalNoActionsHelp: While it stays local: only you see it, it does not sync, and nobody else can edit it with you.
governanceLocalNoActionsPublishedBenefit: Publishing gives you: a link to open it on other devices, a short code to invite people, editor management, and a forum for the course.
governanceModalIntro: The course link opens or adds the course on another device. Your code is your network identity—the publisher uses it to grant you edit access. To invite someone, paste their code in the section below.
governanceModalIntroOwner: Share the course code (above) so others can open the same tree under Trees → Add. To grant editing, paste the collaborator’s personal code in the section below.
governanceNoPublicTree: Open an online course to see the link.
governanceNostrForumHint: Unpublish or moderate forum: same browser where you published (Construction).
governanceOwnerInviteCodeBlurb: Anyone who enters this code under Trees → Add opens the same course. Editing is granted when the author pastes the collaborator’s personal code below.
governanceOwnerInviteCodeMissing: No short code in metadata (older tree or not republished). Use the technical link below if needed.
governancePublicLinkNote: Unpublish or moderate forum: same browser where you published (Construction).
governanceReaderNoRoleIntro: This course is administered by its author on the network. If you added it yourself (code or directory), you have read-only access until the author invites you. Send your personal code (below) to the author and wait for an Editor invitation.
governanceYourPubHint: Send it to the course admin so they can invite you.
governanceYourRoleEditor: Invited editor: you can edit in Construction. Publish or unpublish: owner only.
governanceYourRoleProposer: You have suggest-only access. Ask the owner for Editor to change lessons.
maintainerBlocklistAddRefused: This tree cannot be added: it is on the maintainer blocklist for this build.
maintainerBlocklistLoadRefused: This public tree is on the maintainer blocklist for this app build: it cannot be opened from a link or share code here. Automatic moderation (reports / legal dispute) does not block opening—only this curated list does. To appeal, use the contact or policy channel described for your distribution (e.g. README / email).
pickCurriculumLangAllPresent: All preset languages are already in this tree.
pickCurriculumLangSubtitle: Tap a flag to add that language. Structure is copied from the language you are editing now.
publishConfirmUnexpected: The publish dialog closed without a clear confirmation. Try again; if the problem persists, reload the page.
publishDiffNoBaseline: No published snapshot was found for this local tree yet. Publish once to establish a baseline.
publishDiffNoChanges: No changes since the last publish.
publishMissingAuthor: Fill in the “About this tree” details (min. {n} characters for the author name).
publishMissingDescription: Add a short description in “About this tree” (min. {n} characters).
releasesConfirmDeleteBody: Are you sure you want to remove '{version}'?
releasesCreateFormHint: Enter a short tag (e.g. v2) and tap Create. The app saves this tree under that version when it can.
treePresMobileCompactHint: Public summary & support link — tap to edit
treeReportPolicyBody:
Your report is stored safely (reason and who sent it) so the app can weigh it. It does not delete lessons or remove the course from the internet.

If many people report the same course in a short time, it may stop appearing in the public list inside the app. The app does that on its own—no one at Treesys reads every report like a support chat.

Copyright issues use a separate legal process described in the app’s legal notices.

Normal reports do not email the distributor. For the operator, use only the options below.
treeReportSheetHint: Pick a reason. Sends are limited to prevent abuse.
